final:
module PIPO_Shift_Register (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input load,
    input shift,
    input [4:0] data_in,
    output reg [4:0] data_out
);
    reg [4:0] invalid_reg;

    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            invalid_reg <= 5'b00000;
        end else if (load) begin
            invalid_reg <= data_in;
        end else if (shift) begin
            invalid_reg <= {1'b0, invalid_reg[4:1]}; // Shift right
        end
    end

    always @(*) begin
        data_out = invalid_reg;
    end
endmodule
